body:
This week's AI newsletter: OpenAI Age Predictor + updated LLM course

A New LLM Course Update for You

Plus this week's AI newsletter edition.

*Note: You are receiving this platform-related update because you have an active Educative account. If you wish to unsubscribe from product or other updates related to your account, you can do so anytime.

Денис,

Check out this recently updated course on LLMs:

Featured Course

Essentials of Large Language Models: A Beginner's Journey (https://learn.educative.io/e3t/Ctc/RG+113/cz5H404/VWG1RN3m3JFnW6FBYQy7KkqnbVmLt1V5MBntGN3fD2Cg5m_5PW5BWr2F6lZ3kzW67XBQZ1DjTvgW8wdb8b41LHbSN20LW-MsqmZ7W2Qqtw_9b5dFCW4kM4pp938nXhW6sDkRh95WrVcW845xzZ2g6Xl6W9jf1VT2P4q2vW6h19tK66P1V4W7SpvMt4bBGwzVvmpj-59_HR9W1tqWKC3zmPgdVKx-yP3_4RyfW64fMf43k0y7kW3wL1zS5Z9TmJW2PL2Q-5PKPP_N1Rt7zG4V0BHW2DGkcC4HMtwfW29kkj49jtMnnW4JQh996_YGb1N71L821Fd9d2W6GHb1p365lL0W7Cf4Q11SVntcV8BT_P6F8SkPW5GKdy98W_1PVW7HQ4mV2mK_2FN39-QG-NmTkkN5HMh2XmZtXPW8BNPMX7dDfTRW5wWcC-5gQ3HlW4BjYM839XjC_W9m4tsj1Yys10W3KSpk53ltgBVW78J4d05fMcYmf4WfXQl04 )

Just updated — this beginner-friendly course covers how LLMs work from the ground up: tokenization, attention mechanisms, prompting, RAG, fine-tuning, and building with embeddings. 2 hours, 19 interactive lessons.

In addition, with your Educative account, you get free access to The Educative Newsletter. Here is this week's AI edition:

This Week's Newsletter

OpenAI Age Predictor (https://learn.educative.io/e3t/Ctc/RG+113/cz5H404/VWG1RN3m3JFnW6FBYQy7KkqnbVmLt1V5MBntGN3fD2Cg5m_5PW5BWr2F6lZ3p7W543-GD44WmlJN8l3_Vz3dhf8W3-ssf93X7k9tW7pl0dJ3zqbsKTz_1f58YT4QW27r71t4FpwPMW6yPjBC4y-nD6W7BPzdl6j1DXzW2T1LLR7JJ_8lW69TpqV2vZ72vW5gqsYH6JC3WlW1m7kGH4k24WkW3DBZFY6z_QTqW5Q2WYD7h3cTnVq67cN97w1qTW2g3hPJ5hGL50W63H4CS5T4MLTW3WLwhF2m0nddW90ND1W4N_3yHW59SNMG1mx3_PW5jm-3t6L-QBDN7PqbHK-rGCGVp9zYd78pnQ3W1dWWTv1CX4DmW9dKdwW8PLmyvW81ddl16q7w6JW92l9t38fwC4pW8jn8VP3_x6hSW6RwPn4282LnkW2JYS-G5GCRx4W4tlTqs9hjll6W8RBpcd6fnYJBW58h_xg2m9nhjW5M4wrk4ShdWzf99Y2Yd04 )
